description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image registry.gitlab.com/rilis/docker-ci:ci-latest and three stages: test, stats, docs. Add a clang-format job in the stats stage that runs `find * -iname '*.hpp' -o -iname '*.cpp' | xargs clang-format -i -style=file`, then `git status --porcelain > ../status.log`, `git diff`, and `test ! -s ../status.log`. Add a cpplint job in the stats stage that runs `find * -iname '*.cpp' -o -iname '*.hpp' | xargs cpplint.py --linelength=120 --extensions=hpp,cpp --filter=-legal/copyright,-build/include_order,-build/c++11,+build/c++14,-runtime/references`. Add a doxygen job in the docs stage that runs `doxygen Doxyfile` and publishes the generated `doxygen/html` directory as an artifact that expires in one week. Add a test job in the test stage that runs `hell --install -r "=" -r "RILI_SERVICE_CONSOLE_TESTS=ON" -i "CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release" -i "CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11" -G "Ninja"`, then creates a build directory, runs `cmake ../ -G"Ninja" -DRILI_SERVICE_CONSOLE_TESTS=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=../.hell/install -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11`, and finally executes `ninja install`.
